summary: Frontend E2E for role management system (Teams CRUD, MyTeam, Reports adaptive tabs, route guards) across super_admin, team_leader, and member roles. All 21 test scenarios PASSED.

issues: React hydration warning: `<span>` cannot be a child of `<option>` — caused by Emergent's dev-only x-source annotation wrappers injected into <option> children. Not a functional bug (only a dev-mode console warning), but could be quieted by wrapping option labels in a template that avoids the annotation, or by suppressing the annotation for option children.

action_items: Optional: Investigate hydration warning about `<span>` inside `<option>` in Teams.jsx modals (dev-only annotation issue, non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.jsx line 43: `user.role` accessed without optional chaining under `canTeam` branch — safe because canTeam already requires user set, but consider `user?.role` for consistency.
MyTeam.jsx: no loading skeleton for error states; if /reports/team fails silently the page stays on 'Loading your team...'. Consider surfacing errors.
Teams.jsx uses window.confirm for delete (works but not styled). Consider a themed dialog.
Route guards work correctly via ProtectedRoute — redirects non-permitted roles to `/`.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: TEST team 'Titans_UI_test' -> renamed 'Titans2' -> deleted. Assigned then implicitly deleted a member during flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full role-based navigation & guard matrix verified. Super Admin sees Reports/Teams/Admin (no MyTeam). Team Leader sees Reports/MyTeam (no Teams/Admin). Member sees only Reports (no Team/Global tabs). All Teams CRUD (create/edit/assign/delete) working. Reports tabs correctly adaptive. Route guards redirect properly (unauthorized -> /). Note: Team Alpha has 19 members due to prior test data (expected).

results_detail.super_admin_nav: PASS (reports, admin, teams shown; my-team absent)
results_detail.teams_page_cards: PASS (5 team cards inc. leftover Titans; Alpha/Bravo/Command/Delta all present)
results_detail.leader_my_team_page: PASS (Team Alpha, 19 member rows, stat cards)
